args: repo_root="$PWD" && rustup_cache="$(git rev-parse --git-path .copilot-hooks/podman-rustup)" && cargo_cache="$(git rev-parse --git-path .copilot-hooks/podman-cargo)" && mkdir -p "$rustup_cache" "$cargo_cache" && if [ ! -x "$cargo_cache/bin/cargo" ]; then podman run --rm -i --user "$(id -u):$(id -g)" -v "$rustup_cache":/host-rustup -v "$cargo_cache":/host-cargo docker.io/rust:1.94.0-bookworm sh -c 'cp -a /usr/local/rustup/. /host-rustup/ && cp -a /usr/local/cargo/. /host-cargo/'; fi && podman run --rm -i --user "$(id -u):$(id -g)" -v "$repo_root":/workspace -w /workspace -v "$rustup_cache":/usr/local/rustup -v "$cargo_cache":/usr/local/cargo docker.io/rust:1.94.0-bookworm sh -c 'rustfmt --version >/dev/null 2>&1 || rustup component add rustfmt >/tmp/rustfmt.log 2>&1; rustfmt --version >/dev/null 2>&1 || { cat /tmp/rustfmt.log >&2; exit 1; }; cargo fmt --all'

repo_root="$PWD" && rustup_cache="$(git rev-parse --git-path .copilot-hooks/podman-rustup)" && cargo_cache="$(git rev-parse --git-path .copilot-hooks/podman-cargo)" && mkdir -p "$rustup_cache" "$cargo_cache" && if [ ! -x "$cargo_cache/bin/cargo" ]; then podman run --rm -i --user "$(id -u):$(id -g)" -v "$rustup_cache":/host-rustup -v "$cargo_cache":/host-cargo docker.io/rust:1.94.0-bookworm sh -c 'cp -a /usr/local/rustup/. /host-rustup/ && cp -a /usr/local/cargo/. /host-cargo/'; fi && podman run --rm -i --user "$(id -u):$(id -g)" -v "$repo_root":/workspace -w /workspace -v "$rustup_cache":/usr/local/rustup -v "$cargo_cache":/usr/local/cargo docker.io/rust:1.94.0-bookworm sh -c 'cargo clippy --version >/dev/null 2>&1 || rustup component add clippy >/tmp/clippy.log 2>&1; cargo clippy --version >/dev/null 2>&1 || { cat /tmp/clippy.log >&2; exit 1; }; cargo clippy --fix --allow-dirty --allow-staged --workspace --all-targets'

repo_root="$PWD" && rustup_cache="$(git rev-parse --git-path .copilot-hooks/podman-rustup)" && cargo_cache="$(git rev-parse --git-path .copilot-hooks/podman-cargo)" && mkdir -p "$rustup_cache" "$cargo_cache" && if [ ! -x "$cargo_cache/bin/cargo" ]; then podman run --rm -i --user "$(id -u):$(id -g)" -v "$rustup_cache":/host-rustup -v "$cargo_cache":/host-cargo docker.io/rust:1.94.0-bookworm sh -c 'cp -a /usr/local/rustup/. /host-rustup/ && cp -a /usr/local/cargo/. /host-cargo/'; fi && podman run --rm -i --user "$(id -u):$(id -g)" -v "$repo_root":/workspace -w /workspace -v "$rustup_cache":/usr/local/rustup -v "$cargo_cache":/usr/local/cargo docker.io/rust:1.94.0-bookworm sh -c 'cargo clippy --version >/dev/null 2>&1 || rustup component add clippy >/tmp/clippy.log 2>&1; cargo clippy --version >/dev/null 2>&1 || { cat /tmp/clippy.log >&2; exit 1; }; cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings'
